title: Homeless Fish
description: A Datapack for BigFish making the Fish come from any biome with better fish being more common with bigger luck
body: This Datapack is made to work with Big Fish. In Big Fish all the new fish are found in specific biomes. Installing this Datapack makes it so all the new fish can be fished from anywhere. It also adds the function, where if the player's luck stat is high enough, they are more likely to catch a good fish instead of a mediocre one.
